recommendation: Preserve a separately named built-in Demo view model and prohibit all persistence adapters.
rationale: A distinct source marker prevents Demo data from being mistaken for a room.
Read-only rendering can teach features without creating cloud state.
assumptions: The preview continues to receive the Demo through props.
options: Use the existing built-in source marker.
Convert the Demo to canonical Firebase room data, which would blur ownership.
risks: Schema similarity can invite accidental save calls; preserve explicit naming and tests.

evidence.claim: The Demo model carries a built-in source marker.
The Preview is a display component.

unknowns: A future explicit Clone Flow needs a separately approved contract.
